query:
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, isTemplate
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date BETWEEN
      DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))
  AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York')) + INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY date;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks sb
     JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id
    WHERE dp.date = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))
      AND dp.isTemplate = 0) AS blocks_for_today,
  (SELECT MAX(date) FROM dailyPlans WHERE isTemplate = 0) AS latest_plan_date,
  (SELECT MIN(date) FROM dailyPlans WHERE isTemplate = 0 AND date >= DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))) AS next_plan_date;

SELECT

     JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id
    WHERE dp.date = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', 'America/New_York'))
      AND dp.isTemplate = 0) AS blocks_for_today,
